title: LATAM Medication Adherence Crisis
problem: Medication non-adherence in LATAM causes 30-50% of chronic disease treatment failures. Patients forget doses, don't understand instructions, or can't afford refills. No automated reminder systems integrated with pharmacies. No tracking of medication adherence at population health level. This drives preventable hospitalizations and deaths.
solution: Medication adherence platform integrated with pharmacy dispensing. Automated SMS/WhatsApp reminders for doses. Refill reminders with one-click pharmacy ordering. Gamification elements (streaks, rewards). Analytics dashboard for physicians and insurers to track adherence patterns.
technology: Mobile app, SMS/WhatsApp integration, pharmacy POS integration, analytics dashboard, gamification engine
target_customer: Pharmacies, health insurers (reduce hospitalization costs), pharmaceutical companies (improve outcomes data), patients
traction_signals: Chronic disease epidemic in LATAM (diabetes, hypertension)
High smartphone penetration enables mobile solution
Insurers looking to reduce hospitalization costs
varden_fit: HIGH FIT - Adherence is critical infrastructure for chronic care management. Integrates with Varden's scheduling/patient management. Recurring revenue from insurers/pharma.
notes: BOREALING: Pill reminders are the most basic digital health feature. But done right, integrated with pharmacy and insurance, it's critical infrastructure. High retention, recurring revenue.
